source: Atlanta Event Finder cron — 2-week couples date planner
notes: Two-week couples digest for 6/21 – 7/5/2026 (with rolling summer shows extended into late July). Headline pick: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire at State Farm Arena (Sun 7/19) — anniversary-grade, all the slow-dance songs. Friday pick: Neyo + Akon double-bill at Lakewood Amphitheatre (Sat 7/11). Vegan pick: ATL Vegan Festival in Piedmont Park (Sun 7/12, 11–5). Art pick: Art In The Beltline at Woodruff Park (weekend of 7/10–12, free). Comedy pick: Karlous Miller at Helium (Fri 7/17) or Paula Poundstone at Buckhead Theatre (Fri 6/26). Dance pick: Salsa at Politan Row (Sun 6/21 + 7/19, free entry). Rooftop reggae: Rum Punch Fest on 7/4. Calendar APIs still flaky — confirm dates/prices via the linked venue before booking.
